name: Papara Turkish Digital Wallet and Payments API
what_it_does: Papara Turkish digital wallet and payments REST API for Turkish merchants, e-commerce platforms, and fintech developers to integrate Papara's e-money wallet payment acceptance, money transfer, card issuance, and mass payout capabilities — enabling Turkish consumer payment acceptance, peer-to-peer transfers, prepaid card management, and merchant settlement through Turkey's leading digital wallet platform with 20M+ users. Enables AI agents to manage wallet payment for Turkish consumer checkout automation, handle mass payout for Turkish payroll and affiliate disbursement automation, access card issuance for prepaid card management automation, retrieve transaction data for merchant reconciliation automation, manage refund for payment reversal automation, handle money transfer for P2P and B2B payment automation, access merchant settlement for Turkish payout automation, retrieve account balance for wallet management automation, manage sub-merchant for marketplace payment split automation, and integrate Papara with Turkish e-commerce, gaming, and gig economy platforms for digital payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting Papara wallet payments from Turkish consumers for e-commerce checkout automation agents
Processing mass payouts to Turkish freelancers and affiliates for gig economy disbursement automation agents
Issuing prepaid Papara cards for Turkish employee benefits and expense management automation agents
Integrating Papara with Turkish marketplace platforms for merchant payment split and settlement automation agents
not_for: Non-Turkish markets (Papara is Turkey-specific digital wallet and e-money platform)
International SWIFT wire transfers (Papara is domestic Turkish payment platform)
Large enterprise B2B procurement (Papara is consumer and SME-focused digital payments)
best_when: A Turkish merchant, e-commerce platform, or fintech company wanting AI agents to accept Papara wallet payments, process mass payouts, and integrate with Turkey's leading digital wallet platform serving 20M+ Turkish consumers.
avoid_when: BDDK E-MONEY LICENSE REQUIRED: Papara operates under Turkish Banking Regulation and Supervision Agency (BDDK) e-money license; automated non-regulated payment implementation creates BDDK violation; automated must comply with BDDK e-money regulations. MERCHANT AGREEMENT REQUIRED: Papara merchant API access requires signed merchant agreement and compliance review; automated public API access assumption creates no merchant access; automated must complete Papara merchant onboarding. TURKISH LIRA ONLY: Papara operates in Turkish Lira (TRY); automated foreign currency payment assumption creates currency_not_supported; automated must handle TRY-denominated transactions. MASS PAYOUT KYC LIMITS: Papara applies KYC-based transaction limits for mass payouts; automated unlimited payout assumption creates limit_exceeded for unverified recipients; automated must implement KYC tier limits.

auth.notes: Papara uses API key authentication for merchant API. REST API with JSON. Istanbul, Turkey HQ. Founded 2016 by Ahmed Faruk Kırhan. Products: Papara wallet, Papara Card (prepaid Mastercard), mass payout, merchant payments, money transfer, bill payment. SDKs: JS, PHP, Python, C#, Java. BDDK e-money licensed. 20M+ users. Turkey's leading digital wallet. Backed by Sequoia Turkey, IFC, and others. Competes with PayCore and iyzico for Turkish digital payments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved merchants; production requires merchant agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Merchant discount rate per transaction; mass payout per-transfer fees; prepaid card issuance fees
pricing.notes: Istanbul TR. BDDK e-money. Per-transaction MDR. 20M+ users. Turkey digital wallet leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; payment and payout APIs throttled per merchant tier

known_agent_gotchas: MERCHANT ONBOARDING REQUIRED: Papara merchant API requires approved merchant agreement and BDDK compliance review; automated public API access assumption creates no API endpoint access; automated must complete Papara merchant onboarding before development

TRY CURRENCY ONLY: Papara wallet operates exclusively in Turkish Lira; automated USD/EUR payment processing assumption creates currency_not_supported error; automated must handle TRY amounts and Turkish locale number formatting

MASS PAYOUT KYC TIERS: Papara applies transaction limits based on recipient KYC verification level; automated unlimited mass payout assumption creates limit_exceeded for unverified Papara accounts; automated must check recipient verification tier before large payouts

BDDK TRANSACTION MONITORING: Papara reports to Turkish financial intelligence (MASAK) for AML compliance; automated high-frequency transaction patterns without monitoring creates MASAK flagging risk; automated must implement transaction velocity controls

WEBHOOK PAYMENT CONFIRMATION: Papara payment status is async for wallet transfers; automated synchronous confirmation assumption creates premature order fulfillment; automated must use Papara webhooks for payment confirmed event
agent_readiness.security_notes: Turkish digital wallet. BDDK, MASAK, KVKK. API key. Turkey. Consumer wallet and merchant payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Turkish e-money. BDDK, MASAK, KVKK. API key. Turkey. Consumer wallet and payment data.
